Presentation
============

BAM (Better Actuator Models) targets accurate actuator behavior in simulation by identifying friction models beyond Coulomb-Viscous baselines.

Scope of this release
---------------------

- Single-actuator identification workflow
- Parameter export and simulation integration helpers
- No legacy multi-joint benchmark assets or scripts

What you will find in this documentation
-----------------------------------------

- Identification pipeline and model definitions
- Usage guidance for MuJoCo CPU and MuJoCo Warp via mjlab GPU
- API reference for BAM modules
